prompt: Use the uploaded image as character reference. She wears a high-neck, form-fitting black long-sleeved dress. Scene: an old newsstand with dry branches and orange-pink blooms scattered nearby, vintage film grain woven throughout. Blurred background with visible motion trails and a double-image effect create a fantastical mood. Hauntingly beautiful girl in profile, carrying flowers, fair and delicate skin. Face blurred with panning motion, figure slightly swaying, soft focus adding a hazy, languid feel. Warm-toned low-saturation filter. Long backlit hair glows softly, stray strands sweeping wildly across her jawline, the detail hiding a captivating, dangerous allure. Cute movements add energy, motion blur merging with film grain for a trendy, Instagram-worthy result. Blurred outlines frame a dynamic, story-rich scene that perfectly balances bewitching and sweet.
